name: Fudge (M_c-tx)
recipeInstructions:
1. Using a heavy, large saucepan, combine sugar and milk.
2. Bring the mixture to a rolling boil slowly.
3. Let it boil for no longer than eight minutes, stirring constantly to prevent scorching of the milk.
4. Remove from heat and add miniature marshmallows, chocolate chips, and margarine.
5. Stir until melted and blended well.
6. Add nut meats and vanilla.
7. Spread mixture on a large, ungreased pan.
8. Allow to cool before cutting into squares.
This makes a large batch of fudge—great for gifts. Enjoy!
